pi_items.source: Code execution on the 50 provided emails in assets/emails/ham/ham_*.eml. 0 contain 'exmh' in the Subject line, and only 2 contain 'exmh' anywhere.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real emails from the SpamAssassin public corpus. The expected target folder 'Project-Exmh' and archive recipient 'archive@internal.org' explicitly match the task description instructions and verifier logic. I discovered that the task instructions and metadata claim 'min_emails_expected' of 5 are completely contradicted by the actual dataset: out of the 50 provided emails, exactly 0 contain 'exmh' in the Subject line, and only 2 contain 'exmh' anywhere. Thus, an agent correctly following the prompt instructions will move 0 emails to the folder, perpetually failing the verifier's 5-email population check.
